---
title: "test_odin_main.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_odin_main.py"
loc: 20
complexity: 1
logic_score: 6.92
style_score: 3.76
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.80
---

## Intent
The `test_odin_main.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_adventure, test_odin_adventure_init, test_odin_adventure_apply_passive_ticker. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_adventure, test_odin_adventure_init, test_odin_adventure_apply_passive_ticker. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.main](file://src.games.odin_protocol.main)

### Exports
- `mock_adventure`
- `test_odin_adventure_init`
- `test_odin_adventure_apply_passive_ticker`
